overview: Bhoj Reddy Engineering College for Women (BRECW), established in 1997, is a private women's engineering college sponsored by Sangam Lakshmibai Vidyapeeth. It is situated in the heart of Hyderabad and is dedicated to empowering women through high-quality technical education and professional development.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for reserved) + TS EAPCET
10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TS EAPCET

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TS EAPCET

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TS EAPCET

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via TS EAPCET counseling. 30% of seats (Category B/Management) are filled based on merit in JEE Main or 10+2 marks as per TSCHE norms.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAPCET 2026: May 9 - May 11, 2026; Result: May 17, 2026; Counselling: June - July 2026.

facilities: Indoor & Outdoor Sports Courts (Basketball, Volleyball, etc.)
campus.specialNote: The campus is known for its strict discipline and safe environment for women. While it is located in a busy part of the city (Saidabad), the internal campus is noted for being lush green and pollution-free.

contact.address: Vinaynagar, I S Sadan Crossroads, Saidabad, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500059
